name_address.value: BREWED AND CANNED BY CALVERT BREWING COMPANY, UPPER MARLBORO, MD.

health_warning.value: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) ACCORDING TO THE SURGEON GENERAL, WOMEN SHOULD NOT DRINK ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES DURING PREGNANCY BECAUSE OF THE RISK OF BIRTH DEFECTS. (2) CONSUMPTION OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES IMPAIRS YOUR ABILITY TO DRIVE A CAR OR OPERATE MACHINERY, AND MAY CAUSE HEALTH PROBLEMS.

application.image_quality_notes: Clear vector-style label artwork with legible text on both surfaces.
application.model_observations: Front and back images supplied are identical. Label is a flat printed design with cornflower illustration; no foil/embossing. UPC 0 51497 22052 5 present.
